$comment: Canonical SDK API catalog for @paged-media/idml-viewer (plus the underlying paged-sdk ViewerSession and introspect-wasm Inspector). The docs site pulls this file (docs sources.pin → sdk-catalog) to render the SDK reference, so this is the source of truth that lives next to the API. The co-located vitest test (test/api-catalog.test.ts) asserts every export of src/index.ts appears here — update this file in the SAME PR as any public API change, or that test fails.

groups.title: Lifecycle
groups.summary: Create and tear down a viewer over a canvas.

members.name: createViewer
members.summary: Create a viewer bound to a canvas. Initialises the WebGPU device and the renderer-core session; rejects with a ViewerError if WebGPU is unavailable.

members.name: Viewer.load
members.signature: load(source: ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array | Blob | string): Promise<void>
members.summary: Load an IDML document from bytes, a Blob, or a URL string. Emits `loaded` with the page count when layout is ready.

members.name: Viewer.dispose
members.summary: Destroy the viewer and release its WebGPU device. Always call on unmount; several viewers on one page each own a device.

members.name: createSessionFromBundledWasm
members.summary: Boot a ViewerSession from the wasm bundled with the package — the default session factory createViewer uses. Call directly only to manage the session yourself.

groups.title: Camera (zoom & scroll)
groups.summary: Drive the view transform. Zoom is clamped to [minZoom, maxZoom]; scroll is clamped to the content extent.

members.name: Viewer.zoom
members.summary: The current zoom factor (1 = 100%).

members.name: Viewer.setZoom
members.signature: setZoom(zoom: number, opts?: { anchor?: { x: number; y: number } }): void
members.summary: Set the zoom factor, optionally anchored about a viewport point so that point stays put.

members.name: Viewer.zoomIn
members.summary: Step zoom up by one notch (toward maxZoom).

members.name: Viewer.zoomOut
members.summary: Step zoom down by one notch (toward minZoom).

members.name: Viewer.minZoom
members.summary: The smallest allowed zoom factor.

members.name: Viewer.maxZoom
members.summary: The largest allowed zoom factor.

members.name: Viewer.fit
members.summary: Fit the current page to the viewport — whole page, or page width.

members.name: Viewer.scroll
members.signature: readonly scroll: { x: number; y: number }
members.summary: The current scroll offset, in CSS pixels.

members.name: Viewer.scrollTo
members.summary: Scroll to an absolute offset (clamped to the content extent).

members.name: Viewer.scrollBy
members.summary: Scroll by a relative delta.

groups.title: Page navigation & layout
groups.summary: Move between pages and switch how pages are laid out.

members.name: Viewer.pageCount
members.summary: Number of pages in the loaded document.

members.name: Viewer.currentPage
members.summary: The zero-based index of the page currently in view.

members.name: Viewer.goToPage
members.summary: Scroll the given page into view and make it current. Emits `pageChanged`.

members.name: Viewer.layoutMode
members.summary: Get or set the layout mode — 'single' (one page) or 'continuous' (a scroll of stacked pages).

groups.title: Rendering to pixels
groups.summary: Produce raster output independent of the on-screen canvas.

members.name: Viewer.renderPageThumbnail
members.signature: renderPageThumbnail(index: number, opts?: { width?: number }): Promise<SessionRaster>
members.summary: Render one page to an off-screen RGBA raster at a target width — for page rails and thumbnails.

groups.title: Events
groups.summary: Subscribe with `viewer.on(event, listener)`; it returns an unsubscribe function.

members.name: Viewer.on
members.signature: on<K extends keyof ViewerEvents>(event: K, listener: (payload: ViewerEvents[K]) => void): () => void
members.summary: Subscribe to a viewer event. Returns a disposer that removes the listener.

members.name: loaded
members.summary: Fired once a document has loaded and laid out.

members.name: pageChanged
members.summary: Fired when the current page changes (via goToPage or scrolling).

members.name: zoomChanged
members.summary: Fired when the zoom factor changes.

members.name: scrollChanged
members.summary: Fired when the scroll offset changes.

members.name: error
members.summary: Fired on a recoverable viewer error.

groups.title: Errors
groups.summary: The viewer reports failures as a typed ViewerError with a stable code.

members.name: ViewerError
members.signature: class ViewerError extends Error { code: ViewerErrorCode }
members.summary: Thrown by createViewer/load and emitted on `error`. Inspect `code` rather than the message.

members.name: ViewerErrorCode
members.summary: Stable machine-readable error codes — branch on these (e.g. GPU_UNAVAILABLE → show a no-WebGPU fallback).

groups.title: Camera helpers (pure functions)
groups.summary: Stateless math exported for building custom navigation UIs — page rails, minimaps, fit buttons.

members.name: clampZoom
members.summary: Clamp a zoom factor into [min, max].

members.name: clampScroll
members.signature: clampScroll(x: number, y: number, viewport: Viewport, extent: ContentExtent): { x: number; y: number }
members.summary: Clamp a scroll offset to the content extent for a viewport.

members.name: contentExtent
members.summary: Total scrollable content size at a given zoom.

members.name: currentPageAt
members.summary: Which page is in view at a scroll position (continuous mode).

members.name: fitPage
members.signature: fitPage(page: SessionPageRect, viewport: Viewport, mode: 'page' | 'width'): number
members.summary: The zoom that fits a page to the viewport.

members.name: scrollToPage
members.signature: scrollToPage(layout: SessionPagesLayout, pageIndex: number, viewport: Viewport): number
members.summary: The scrollY that brings a page into view.

members.name: zoomAt
members.signature: zoomAt(point, newZoom, currentZoom, scroll): { x: number; y: number }
members.summary: The scroll offset that keeps a point fixed while zooming about it.

groups.title: Types
groups.summary: The exported TypeScript types you compose against.

members.name: CreateViewerOptions
members.signature: interface CreateViewerOptions { canvas: HTMLCanvasElement | OffscreenCanvas; session?; layoutMode?: LayoutMode; input?: InputOptions }
members.summary: Options for createViewer — the target canvas, an optional session factory, the initial layout mode, and input behaviour.

members.name: LayoutMode
members.summary: Single-page or continuous-scroll page layout.

members.name: InputOptions
members.signature: interface InputOptions { wheelZoom?: boolean; dragPan?: boolean; doubleClickZoom?: boolean; keyboard?: boolean }
members.summary: Which built-in input gestures the viewer handles.

members.name: ViewerEvents
members.signature: interface ViewerEvents { loaded; pageChanged; zoomChanged; scrollChanged; error }
members.summary: The event map the `on` method is typed against.

members.name: Camera
members.signature: interface Camera { zoom: number; scroll: { x: number; y: number } }
members.summary: A view transform — zoom plus scroll offset.

members.name: Viewport
members.signature: interface Viewport { width: number; height: number }
members.summary: The size of the visible canvas region in CSS pixels.

members.name: ZoomLimits
members.signature: interface ZoomLimits { min: number; max: number }
members.summary: The clamp range for zoom.

members.name: SessionRaster
members.signature: interface SessionRaster { width: number; height: number; rgba: Uint8Array }
members.summary: A rendered raster — tightly-packed RGBA8 plus its dimensions.

members.name: SessionPagesLayout
members.signature: interface SessionPagesLayout { gapPt: number; pages: SessionPageRect[] }
members.summary: Page rectangles in point space, with the inter-page gap.

members.name: SessionPageRect
members.signature: interface SessionPageRect { index: number; yPt: number; widthPt: number; heightPt: number }
members.summary: One page's position and size in point space.

members.name: SessionDiagnostics
members.signature: interface SessionDiagnostics { ok: boolean; messages: SessionDiagnostic[] }
members.summary: The result of a load/present call — overall ok plus structured messages.

members.name: SessionDiagnostic
members.signature: interface SessionDiagnostic { severity: 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'; code: string; message: string; part?: string; line?: number }
members.summary: One diagnostic, with the originating IDML part where known.

members.name: ViewerSessionLike
members.signature: interface ViewerSessionLike { load(...): SessionDiagnostics; present(...): SessionDiagnostics; … }
members.summary: The structural contract createViewer expects of a session — implement it to supply a custom session.

groups.title: ViewerSession (low-level, @paged-media/sdk)
groups.summary: The wasm session `createViewer` wraps. Use it directly only when you need raw control — most apps use the Viewer wrapper above.

members.name: ViewerSession.new
members.summary: Construct a session (acquires a WebGPU adapter).

members.name: ViewerSession.load
members.summary: Parse and build a document; returns load diagnostics (errors/warnings with the originating IDML part).

members.name: ViewerSession.register_font
members.signature: register_font(family: string, style: string | undefined, bytes: Uint8Array): void
members.summary: Register a font face for text layout before loading.

members.name: ViewerSession.page_count
members.summary: Number of pages in the loaded document.

members.name: ViewerSession.set_page
members.summary: Select the page to render in single-page mode.

members.name: ViewerSession.page_layout
members.summary: The page rectangles in point space — the basis for camera math.

members.name: ViewerSession.present
members.signature: present(zoom: number, scrollX: number, scrollY: number, dpr: number, onlyPage?: number): Diagnostics
members.summary: Render the current camera to the bound canvas.

members.name: ViewerSession.render_to_canvas
members.summary: Render to an OffscreenCanvas (worker path).

members.name: ViewerSession.render_page_to_bytes
members.summary: Render one page to RGBA bytes at a target width.

members.name: ViewerSession.render_to_bytes
members.summary: Render the current page to RGBA bytes at a DPI.

members.name: ViewerSession.resize
members.signature: resize(width: number, height: number, devicePixelRatio: number): void
members.summary: Resize the render surface.

groups.title: Inspector (read-only, @paged-media/introspect-wasm)
groups.summary: Inspect a document's scene tree and properties, and render single pages, without a canvas — handy for tests and tooling.

members.name: Inspector
members.summary: Construct an inspector over a document's bytes.

members.name: Inspector.tree
members.summary: The scene tree as JSON.

members.name: Inspector.properties
members.summary: Property descriptors for an addressed node.

members.name: Inspector.renderPage
members.summary: Render one page to PNG bytes.

members.name: describeCatalog
members.summary: The engine capability catalog as JSON — no document required. The source the docs' generated reference tables read.
